image_prompt.scene: Misty morning at a martial arts training ground with ancient stone tiles, a lone young swordsman in simple cloth robes practicing sword forms under a centuries-old willow tree, morning fog swirling around wooden practice dummies and weapon racks.

composition.lighting: Soft dawn light filtering through fog, cool blue-gray tones
composition.ambiance: Mystysterious and serene, fog particles in god rays

video_prompt.action: The young swordsman executes a slow deliberate sword kata, blade cutting through mist, droplets flying off the sword tip
video_prompt.ambiance_audio: Distant birdsong, wind through willow branches, rhythmic swishing of sword through air

dialogue.text: 第一千次了，还是差一点。

image_prompt.scene: Same training ground now with morning light brighter, the young swordsman pausing mid-practice as a coldly beautiful young woman approaches with an ice-crystal sword, her robes flowing in the breeze.

composition.lighting: Brighter morning light, warm golden hour tones
composition.ambiance: Sudden tension breaking the morning solitude

video_prompt.action: The woman stops at the edge of the training ground, her cold gaze sweeping over the swordsman, she draws her ice blade in a single fluid motion
video_prompt.ambiance_audio: Morning breeze, distant footsteps, the crystalline ring of a sword being drawn

dialogue.text: 你就是那个打破石碑的外门弟子？
